issues.description: Missing entire first effect: '[Opponent's Turn] If this Character is rested, your opponent cannot attack any card other than the Character [Eustass"Captain"Kid].' This is a passive ability during opponent's turn, not an activated ability.
Second effect trigger should be 'Activated' with duration 'DuringYourTurn' and cost constraint, not just raw trigger. Needs proper action structure for resting and playing character.
HasRestingDon is checked as condition, but activation cost is '[Rest this Character]' - should be a cost/requirement in the action, not a pre-condition for playing the card.
PlayFromHand action missing 'Rest' action as prerequisite. The ability requires you to rest the character to activate it. Should have Rest action first.
